description: A centered light-grey box containing a numbered list of four AI priorities: 1. Enhancing search quality, user personalisation and productivity across existing platforms; 2. Building new AI-powered features that improve user experience and engagement; 3. Creating entirely new products and monetisation levers powered by AI; 4. Leveraging AI internally to improve operational efficiency, decision-making speed and execution agility. A thin blue line appears along the bottom of the box.
